items.title: U.K. police charge six more with violent disorder at protest over teen’s stabbing death
items.summary: British police have charged six more people with violent disorder at a protest over the stabbing death of a university student

items.title: 'India's Youth Not Puppets Of Some People On Foreign Soil': BJP Chief
items.summary: "Some people, sitting abroad, sitting on foreign soil, think that they will give direction to the youth of India... make them puppets," BJP national chief Nitin Nabin said
